name: Multi-DAO Snapshot Voting
description: Sign and submit votes to multiple Snapshot spaces in a single agent task. Eliminates the friction of voting on 10+ DAOs each governance cycle. Off-chain signature, gas-free.
use_case: Agent holds tokens in 15 DAOs (Uniswap, Arbitrum, Optimism, ENS, etc.). Weekly governance cycle has 30+ active proposals. This skill votes on all of them per the agent's policy in <5 seconds.

body.query: { proposals(where: { space_in: $SPACES, state: "active" }) { id title space { id } } }

verification.criteria: Snapshot Hub API returns the agent's signature against the proposal ID with matching choice value. Verifier reads via /api/votes endpoint.
